name: Dubois Outdoor Pickleball Court Facility
description: The Dubois Outdoor Pickleball Court Facility consists of 4 new outdoor courts in the Dubois Town Park! The courts are open to the public from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM every day and are available on a first come, first serve basis! Public restrooms are nearby along with a children's park, tennis court facility, basketball court, skate park, and softball field. A lovely river walkway also borders the park. There is currently no charge to play on the courts!
open_play_schedule: The local YeeHaw Pickleball Club organizes group play time on Sunday mornings at 9:00 AM and Wednesday afternoons at 4:00 PM. All are welcome to join. Otherwise, the courts are open to the public on a first come, first serve basis!

name: Lander Valley High School
description: Come play pickleball at Lander Valley High School in Lander, WY! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Riverton City Park Pickleball Courts
description: Riverton City Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Riverton, WY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.
